---
title: "Edith Thompson"
---

## Edith Thompson

**Dates:** (1848–1929)

### Description

historian and lexicographer, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1889)

### Biography

She was author of the <i>History of England</i>  (1872), friend of E. A. Freeman and daughter of Thomas Perronet Thompson. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 18th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
